title: AdversarialOutput
description: Structured output of /codex:adversarial-diff-review and /codex:adversarial-review. Validated by adversarialEngine.dispatchAndValidate (diff) and runGeneralAdversarialReview (arbitrary paths) before being surfaced to the user or emitted as a tool-result.

verdict.description: Overall ship/no-ship verdict. 'blocker' means at least one critical or high finding must be fixed first.

critical.description: Issues that would cause data loss, security breach, or production outage.

high.description: Issues that would cause a degraded user experience or rollback.

medium.description: Correctness gaps that don't yet manifest in production.

next_steps.description: Short ordered list of actions the author should take to address the findings.

safe_to_ship.description: Paths of files within the diff that are safe to ship as-is, even if other parts of the diff are not.

file.description: Forward-slash-form path within the repo. Normalized via util/paths.toUnixPath.

line.description: 1-indexed line number in the post-diff file.

surface.description: The hard-coded attack surface this issue falls under. MUST match prompts/adversarial-system.md verbatim.
